_comment: Salaried staff genuinely away in the OPEN week. Read by rebuild_wages.py: a salaried person under contract hours is only booked as leave if listed here for those dates; everyone else is assumed to have worked (unclocked/unapproved), so their full salary lands on the venue line. Closed weeks state real leave via Xero and ignore this file. Add an entry when someone goes on leave; remove or let it lapse when they're back. Dates inclusive.
